items.name_cn:
Twilly|Maya Jungle Orpheus Magic
Designer: Alice Shirley
04 Color, Sky Blue / Beige / Cinnabar Red
·
The pastel blue Maya Jungle is softer than blue and gray.
·
Orpheus is a figure from Greek mythology, most famous for his masterful lyre playing. His music could enchant the wild animals of the forest; even streams would stop, and trees would lean in to listen to his beautiful song.
The magical legend of Orpheus is interpreted on this small Twilly, with Orpheus playing moving music in the jungle. Deer, lions, bears, and horses are moved by the sound, attracted by the touching melody.

items.name_en: Instantly smitten Twilly|||In stock [Laughing], I really like it. I was amazed the moment I saw it. The colors are varied but not messy. The owl is the perfect finishing touch [Thumbs up]. The whole scarf is full of vitality, especially suitable for autumn and winter~ Paired with elephant gray or solid colors, it is absolutely stunning.

items.name_en: Wow✨Twilly has so many uses. The most common use is wrapping around handbag handles. Girls with long hair can use it to tie their hair, super gentle ☺️. In summer, it can be a small scarf or tied around the wrist. It is a small accessory with many uses. This one, needless to say, is absolutely explosively good-looking 💥~
